named.ok: ok
single.ok: ok
pair.ok: n=42 err=<nil>
named.panic: panic=named-err
single.panic: panic=unnamed-single
pair.panic: n=0 panic=unnamed-pair
eMap.panic: err=mapped: em-boom
eWrap.panic: err=during work: q: recovered panic: ew-boom
eErr.panic: err=fixed-replacement
multi.panic: err=inner-wrap: q: recovered panic: multi-boom
explicit.panic: panic=explicit-boom
